title: dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. cungsii
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. cungsii, also known as Himalayan orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayan region, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory conditions.
